use_cases: Creative professional portfolio showcase with animated background
Developer portfolio landing page with project display and stats
Personal brand landing page with WebGL-powered visual effects
Portfolio page for showcasing work with tag filtering and CTAs
Animated hero landing for digital agencies and creative studios
ai_summary: A comprehensive portfolio landing page featuring a Three.js WebGL-powered aurora animated background with gradient shaders. Includes navigation, hero section with gradient text, project showcase grid, statistics display, and call-to-action buttons. Designed for creative professionals and developers to showcase their work with immersive animated visuals.
